title: White Glass Baubles
features: White baubles to make your tree stand out this year
6 pack of onion and traditional baubles in matt and shiny finishes
Different designs with glitter and mottled effects
description: Product Description Elevate your Christmas décor with our set of six White glass baubles. This elegant assortment includes three onion-shaped and three traditional round baubles, finished in a mix of shiny and matt textures for a sophisticated look. Ideal for adorning trees, enhancing centrepiece arrangements, or embellishing mantels, these baubles are versatile in use and striking in appearance. Each bauble is crafted with care and attention to detail, ensuring they are as durable as they are beautiful. Hang the Christmas baubles with ease by using the accompanying hanging string which comes in Silver colour to create an added element of style to your tree. Onion Bauble: 10 cm Traditional Bauble: 10 cm White Elegance in Every Ornament: Discover the Timeless Charm of Our White Glass Baubles! Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts.
